import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let token = tokens.get(i)
    match token
    when Some(t)
      let n = string.parse_int(t)
      match n
      when Some(num)
        if num > 0
          count = count + 1
        end
      when None
      end
    when None
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  print("positive=#{count}")
  Ok(())
end
